title: Yellow Jacket Removal in South Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional yellow jacket removal in South Bronx, Bronx. Safe, fast wasp nest elimination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for $350-$550 service!
intro: Yellow jackets pose a serious threat to South Bronx residents and businesses, especially during warmer months when these aggressive wasps build nests in building eaves, courtyards, and parks. Our professional yellow jacket removal service provides safe, effective elimination of nests throughout the South Bronx area. With pricing between $350-$550, we deliver fast response times and guaranteed results to protect your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served South Bronx for years with licensed technicians who understand the unique challenges of yellow jacket infestations in urban residential buildings and commercial properties. Our team uses safe, EPA-approved treatments and offers same-day emergency service to quickly eliminate dangerous nests before anyone gets stung.
localContext: South Bronx neighborhoods like Mott Haven, Melrose, and Hunts Point feature a mix of residential apartment buildings, NYCHA developments, and commercial spaces where yellow jackets commonly nest in hidden corners, fire escapes, and outdoor dining areas. The proximity to the Harlem River waterfront and local parks creates ideal conditions for yellow jacket colonies, making professional removal essential for community safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a yellow jacket nest in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service throughout South Bronx for emergency yellow jacket situations. Most nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours of arrival, depending on nest size and location. Our technicians come fully equipped to handle nests in apartment buildings, storefronts, and outdoor areas common in the neighborhood.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 yellow jacket removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes complete inspection, nest location identification, safe removal using professional-grade treatments, nest disposal, and a follow-up visit if needed. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and whether multiple nests are present. We provide upfront pricing before starting any work.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets dangerous to South Bronx residents?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are aggressive defenders of their nests and can sting multiple times, unlike bees. They're particularly dangerous in densely populated areas like South Bronx where children play outside and people gather in courtyards. Those with allergies face serious health risks, making professional removal critical for safety.

faqs.question: When is yellow jacket season in the Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yellow jacket activity peaks from late summer through early fall (August-October) in the Bronx, when colonies reach maximum size. However, nests can form as early as May and remain active until the first hard frost. If you spot yellow jackets entering and exiting a single location repeatedly, you likely have a nest requiring professional removal.
